nasb.text: He sprinkled some of it on the altar seven times and anointed the altar and all its utensils, and the basin and its stand, to consecrate them.

esv.text: And he sprinkled some of it on the altar seven times, and anointed the altar and all its utensils and the basin and its stand, to consecrate them.

cnv.text: 又七次彈膏油在祭壇上，膏抹祭壇和祭壇的一切器皿，以及洗濯盆和盆座，使它們分別為聖。

ccb.text: 再用膏油在祭坛上洒七次，又抹祭坛和祭坛上的器具、洗濯盆和盆座，使它们圣洁。
